stemHtml: The status of the aerodrome movement area and related facilities shall be provided to the AIS for transmittal to aircraft. – Which of the following matters shall in particular be reported to the AIS?

options.a: Failure of the aerodrome`s secondary power supply.
options.b: Expanded security checks in the terminal due to a raised alert level.
options.c: Irregular operation of the baggage X-ray screening system.
options.d: Maintenance work at the aerodrome`s fuel-storage facilities.
